name: Hopkins Park
description: Major renovations have been completed at Hopkins Park. One of the tennis court sections was converted into four pickleball courts.

name: Milestone Park Playground
description: Come play pickleball at Milestone Park Playground in Sandwich, IL! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Sycamore Park District Community Center
description: Sycamore Park District Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Sycamore, IL. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: The Pickleball Connection
description: The Pickleball Connection is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sycamore, IL. There are 7 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.
